quoteLast: years of conspiracy, uncertainty, and deliberate penetration into the Communist Party.”
title: The free man's library
author: Hazlitt, Henry, 1894-1993

quoteFirst: “At 8 o’clock in the morning of the 20th, the _Victory_ hove to, and Admiral Collingwood, with the captains of the _Mars_, _Colossus_, and _Defence_, came on board to receive instructions from his Lordship: at
quoteLast: they returned to their respective ships, and the fleet made sail again to the Northward. In the afternoon the wind increased, and blew fresh from the S.W., which excited much apprehension on board the _Victory_, lest the enemy might be forced to return to port. The look-out ships, however, made several signals for seeing them, and to report their force and bearings. His Lordship was at that time on the poop; and turning round, and observing a group of midshipmen assembled together, he said to them with a smile, ‘This day, or to-morrow, will be a fortunate one for you, young men,’ alluding to
title: The Boys' Nelson
author: Wheeler, Harold, 1877-
